---
name: "Issue 10 — Clean Up Azure Resources"
about: "Delete all Azure resources after the demo is complete"
title: "Clean Up Azure Resources"
labels: "post-demo"
---

## Task
After the demo is complete, delete all Azure resources to avoid unnecessary costs.

### Steps
1. Go to the [Azure Portal](https://portal.azure.com)
2. Navigate to the **Resource Group** created for this demo
3. Click **Delete resource group** and confirm
4. Verify the Container App, Container Apps environment, Container Registry, and any associated resources are fully removed

> ⚠️ Only do this after the demo is fully complete and you no longer need the live URL.
